name: AI Customer Inbox Responder
description: Fetches recent unread emails from Gmail, uses Claude AI to analyze each message and draft contextually appropriate reply suggestions, and posts the drafted replies to Slack for human review. Adapted from n8n's Instagram DM agent workflow.

source.originalName: AI agent for Instagram DM/inbox. Manychat + Open AI integration

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for reading inbox

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting draft replies

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the draft replies for review

maxEmails.description: Maximum number of unread emails to process (default: 10)

replyTone.description: Tone for draft replies (e.g. professional, casual, formal)

companyContext.description: Brief company/product context for more relevant replies

steps.name: Extract message IDs from email list
Compile email details for AI analysis
Build Claude prompt for reply drafting
Build Slack Block Kit draft replies
